questionHtml:
What does not affect the mass of products formed in electrolysis of an aqueous solution?

A.     Current

B.     Duration of electrolysis

C.     Initial mass of cathode

D.     Charge on the ions

meta.title: What does not affect the mass of products formed in electrolysis of an aqueous solution? A. Current B. Duration of electrolysis C. Initial mass of cathode D. Charge on the ions
